directives.directive: Future modifications under LZClaw/src should use the LZClaw customization-layer pattern: centralized config for declarative defaults and feature flags, policies for business decisions, adapters/services for logic integration, and component/page overrides for UI differences. Avoid scattering fork-specific conditionals across upstream-shaped code and avoid putting all behavior into one giant config object.
每次修改 LZClaw 定制内容后，都要同步更新 docs/lzclaw-customization-notes.md，记录修改目的、涉及文件、验证情况和后续合并注意点。
